allow: Bash(cd "/f/SIGNATUR SHADES/signature-sap/backend" && npx prisma migrate dev --name add_trash_and_password_reset 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec signatureshades-db-local psql -U signatureshades_dev -d signatureshades_dev -c "SELECT item_name, price FROM inventory_items WHERE category IN \('SHEER_HOOK','SHEER_BRACKET','SHEER_WAND','SHEER_REMOTE','SHEER_CHARGER'\) ORDER BY category, item_name;")

PowerShell(docker exec signatureshades-db-local psql -U signatureshades_dev -d signatureshades_dev -c "SELECT motor_type, width_from, width_to, price FROM sheer_motor_pricing ORDER BY motor_type, width_from;")

PowerShell(docker exec signatureshades-db-local psql -U signatureshades_dev -d signatureshades_dev -c "SELECT fabric_group, drop_surcharge_per_m, fullness_130_surcharge, fullness_140_surcharge, fullness_150_surcharge FROM sheer_group_settings ORDER BY fabric_group;")

PowerShell(docker exec signatureshades-db-local psql -U signatureshades_dev -d signatureshades_dev -c "SELECT fabric_name, price_per_meter FROM sheer_fabric_pricing WHERE user_id IS NULL AND fabric_group='Group 1' LIMIT 5;")

PowerShell(docker exec signatureshades-db-local psql -U signatureshades_dev -d signatureshades_dev -c "SELECT order_number, subtotal, total FROM orders WHERE order_number LIKE '260093%' OR order_number LIKE '260092%';")

PowerShell(docker exec signatureshades-db-local psql -U signatureshades_dev -d signatureshades_dev -c "SELECT order_number, product_type, subtotal, total FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;")
